originalAlarm.description: `__curr_1644` could be null (null value originating from line 2577) and is dereferenced.

sanitizedDescription: `curr` could be null (null value originating from line 2577) and is dereferenced.
reasoning: Same bug as TRANSFORMATION_99: curr from malloc() at L65 can be NULL, dereferenced at L67 (curr->next = head) without NULL check. Genuine null dereference. No // ERROR at L67, new bug. L65-70 are in main() outside all #ifdef blocks — bug fires in all configs. PC = !CONFIG_FEATURE_LS_SORTFILES (the complementary constraint to TRANSFORMATION_99 which had SORTFILES=T). Over-constrained — does not need SORTFILES constraint at all.
